antipattern.symptom: Each tool gets its own exporter and span.
antipattern.fix: Single OTEL exporter; each tool consumes from the collector.

antipattern.symptom: PII redacted in Langfuse UI after upload.
antipattern.fix: Move redaction to wrapper edge; never ship raw PII.

antipattern.symptom: EU customers traced through US-hosted SaaS.
antipattern.fix: Self-host Langfuse + Phoenix; mark US-hosted tools as opt-in.
